Off Calendar Apr-21-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jordan Chabeear, Tel. 510.333.7327, defendant and moving party appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT JORDAN CHABEEAR'S Motion For Order Transferring Case To Appropriate Court [Change Of Venue] [CCP 396b] is granted. The motion to transfer this action to Alameda County. No opposition was filed. Plaintiff shall pay the fees the transfer may incur. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
